M-052.NAME: official-mtproxy-data-plane
M-052.path: official-mtproxy deploy docker-compose.yml deploy/deploy-on-server.sh deploy/haproxy-phase40.cfg deploy/mtproto-de-compose.yml scripts/phase40-official-mtproxy-live-smoke.sh docs/plans/Phase-40.xml docs/plans/Phase-41.xml
M-052.owns: Official Telegram MTProxy runtime, redacted runtime launcher, local stats/health contract, and RU-to-DE MTProto data-plane routing.
M-052.purpose: Provide the Phase-40 official MTProxy data-plane reference, now planned to be superseded by Phase-41 KPprotoN fake-TLS production routing.

exports.runtime-official-mtproxy: Runs the official mtproto-proxy binary on the DE MTProto node with generated -S user secrets.
exports.launcher-redacted: Starts the runtime from a secret manifest without printing full tg links or raw secrets.
exports.stats-private: Exposes MTProxy stats only over a private or loopback-only path for operator health checks.
exports.manifest-idempotency: Skips official runtime restart when the active secret manifest fingerprint is unchanged and the process is still running.
exports.ru-mtproto-route: Receives non-HTTPS MTProto traffic from the RU public 443 router and forwards it to DE.
exports.phase40-live-smoke: Validates public RU 443 to DE official runtime with an operator-safe req_pq probe.

data-plane-contract.contract-1: The official runtime accepts one or more active user secrets as 32-hex -S values.
data-plane-contract.contract-2: The user-facing secure link uses secret=dd<32-hex-secret>, but the runtime receives the secret without the dd prefix.
data-plane-contract.contract-3: The launcher must obtain Telegram proxy-secret and proxy-multi.conf using the official upstream endpoints or existing cached files, with refresh behavior documented for restart.
data-plane-contract.contract-4: Runtime health must include ready/active target checks where available and must not require public stats exposure.
data-plane-contract.contract-5: Repeated apply of the same active secret manifest must not restart mtproto-proxy or interrupt live Telegram sessions.
data-plane-contract.contract-6: Containerized official MTProxy runtime should launch with HTTP stats enabled and optional NAT mapping for the DE public IP when docker0/global address differ.

constraints.constraint-1: Do not use a wrapper mode that prints generated proxy links or raw secrets into docker logs.
constraints.constraint-2: Do not rely on the old KPprotoN fake-TLS policy API as the production data-plane gate.
constraints.constraint-3: Public TCP 443 changes must preserve HTTPS reachability for krotpn.xyz and admin 8443 behavior.
constraints.constraint-4: Restart-on-secret-manifest-change is acceptable in Phase-40, but apply failure must be visible as degraded and retryable.
constraints.constraint-5: Any runtime token, private key, proxy-secret file, user secret, or full proxy link must be redacted from logs and smoke output.
constraints.constraint-6: Phase-41 must remove M-052 from the active production data-plane unless an explicit rollback requires it.

phase-41-supersession.item-1: Official MTProxy remains useful as diagnostic reference, but it is not the selected production model for per-user SNI issuance.
phase-41-supersession.item-2: Phase-41 execution must prevent the official runtime from owning the active DE MTProto service path.

evidence.evidence-1: 2026-05-19: Phase-39 client-level diagnostics found req_pq timeout through the current KPprotoN/Erlang runtime.
evidence.evidence-2: 2026-05-19: Temporary official MTProxy runtime on the DE host passed normal and secure req_pq smoke, proving the official runtime is the selected Phase-40 data-plane.
evidence.evidence-3: 2026-05-19: Local execution added official-mtproxy runtime scaffold, Phase-40 HAProxy router, DE compose wiring, deploy copy/env changes, redacted live-smoke gate, and deploy/static tests; clean-VPS live req_pq remains pending.
evidence.evidence-4: 2026-05-19: Live DE hotfix found repeated identical manifest apply was restarting mtproto-proxy and interrupting Telegram sessions; supervisor idempotency, HTTP stats, and NAT info were applied live, repeated scheduler sync produced UNCHANGED without SIGTERM, and policy health reported healthy.
evidence.evidence-5: 2026-05-19: Phase-41 planning supersedes M-052 for production because official manifest/process semantics do not match the required no-restart per-user SNI model.

M-052.hotspot: H-039: Official MTProxy runtime must pass req_pq through public 443 and must not print generated links or secrets through default wrapper logs.
